name: Tv Trio -skibidi toliet
description:
The tv trio is

Titan tvman which is a large man with a cinema tv as his head wearing all black and as an Energy blade attached to his Right arm and has Two tvs attached on the side of his heads and two small laser cannons on top of his head he has Two tvs on his shoulders and a jetpack he has two claws on his shoulders too

Tv woman is an woman with a tv head that can burn stuff by turning it yellow she can detach her head like titan tvman she wears all black and a jetpack Two small purple claws on his shoulders and a core on her chest

Destructor Tv man

Half titan of the tvmen race half the size of titan tvman has the same head as him and has some small speakers on his chest core and head

Abilities: titan tvman can teleport like the others and has tv screen abilities and one named RSOD a red screen that makes anyone commit

Tv woman can teleport and has a tv screen abilitie that allows her to pull anyone close

Destructor Tv man can teleport and his own RSOD is more intense
creator: Kazuya_Michima
